message:
feat(search): add chunking adapter for terminal metadata preservation (B5 milestone)

Create chunking_adapter module that maps SemanticChunk to ChunkDocument,
preserving all terminal-specific metadata (pane_id, session_id, direction,
source offsets, overlap, timestamps) in ft.-prefixed metadata keys. Includes
bidirectional conversion, batch stats, and 50+ unit tests covering roundtrip
fidelity, edge cases, and determinism. Add chunking_adapter_enabled config
field to OrchestratorConfig and OrchestrationMetrics for migration tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
